questionHtml: Outline the functions of type I and type II pneumocytes.
markschemeHtml:
type I:

a. carry out gas exchange
OR
diffusion of gases/CO2/O2 ✔

type II:

b. secrete fluid/surfactant ✔

meta.title: Outline the functions of type I and type II pneumocytes.
breadcrumbLabels: B2.3.8. Adaptations of type I and type II pneumocytes in alveoli
